$schema_note: Template for a batched, non-interactive run of the net_sec_hardening workflow. One entry in 'requests' = one independent workflow execution. Intended for the provider's Batch API (discounted, asynchronous).
notes: Batch = throughput discount for work that doesn't need to be interactive.
It does NOT change which model runs or how tokens are tiered — same model, same rates, just discounted and async.
Each request reuses the cacheable prefix from prompt_reasoner.md; only the input suffix differs.

input.goal: Harden a home LAN with an IoT segment and one internet-facing service.
input.topology: Single /24, flat. Router does NAT. NAS reachable from all devices. Cameras phone home.
input.current_state: Default router creds changed; no VLANs; no logging enabled.
